payload.summary: Planned ambient continuous review + self-verifying finding ledger, adapting roborev concepts onto our coordinator+skills stack as a continuous sensor that feeds (not replaces) the existing gate-time consensus. Approach A (hook-driven, local-first ledger) approved at Gate 1. 8-package coordinated-tier DAG; all validations pass.

decisions.title: One phased change, not a roadmap
decisions.rationale: User chose single change-id with phases 0-5 for items 1-5.

decisions.title: Phase 0 extracts refine-core first
decisions.rationale: De-conflicts with in-progress harness-engineering-features Feature 1, which also edits convergence_loop.py; converts merge-conflict risk into a shared dependency.

decisions.title: Ambient review on-by-default with kill-switch
decisions.rationale: User chose on-by-default; single-vendor read-only fast tier bounds cost; REVIEW_AMBIENT=0 disables.

decisions.title: Local-first ledger, best-effort coordinator sync
decisions.rationale: Works offline; coordinator sync idempotent on stable content-derived id.

decisions.title: compact reuses consensus_synthesizer matching
decisions.rationale: Avoid a third dedup implementation per CLAUDE.md shared-logic rule.

next_steps: /implement-feature ambient-review-ledger starting with wp-contracts and wp-refine-core (parallel roots).

relevant_files.description: approved proposal (Approach A selected at Gate 1)
